subject: steps-private-research offline HD evidence lifecycle
rights_scope: Research and test evidence only; no formal game release is authorized by this record.
limitations: The 1024x1024 mapping board is an offline source-relative atlas, not a playable target frame or same-state browser capture.
Unverified body-glyph evidence blocks promotion to packaged capture even though all declared source-relative elements have mappings.
No human principle gate has passed; acceptance remains a separate immutable decision after real packaged capture.
